# <!--name-->Warn Skip Verify<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Emit a standardized warning when package verification is intentionally skipped.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name               | Description                                                | Required | Default          |
|--------------------|------------------------------------------------------------|----------|------------------|
| `verify-step-name` | Name of the skipped verification step.                     | `false`  | `Verify package` |
| `input-name`       | Name of the workflow_dispatch input that allowed the skip. | `false`  | `skip_verify`    |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/warn-skip-verify" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Warn when package verification is skipped"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/warn-skip-verify@main"
```

<!--/usage-->
